title: PredictedLocus
description: Response from an engine (Discrete or Character) containing the mathematical prediction to render in Window 1. Carries equations, uncertainty, posit-grade flags, and reproducibility metadata.

reproducibility_hash.description: SHA-256 of (framework_version + module_version + parameters). Identical inputs MUST produce identical hash. Used for audit trail integrity.

computational_cost_ms.description: Wall-clock cost of producing this response. For diagnostics and performance budgeting.

regime.description: Classification of where this substrate sits in regime space. 'out_of_scope' means the framework is silent here — renderers should hatch the window.

regime_confidence.description: Engine's confidence in the regime classification.

continuous_state.description: Continuous-mode (Character) state variables. Null when mode='discrete'.

chit.description: chit = ln(G0/L). Sign and magnitude classify regime.

V_scalar.description: Lyapunov scalar at current operating point. Null when no Lyapunov exists (e.g. k_frust).

k_frust_subgraphs.description: List of frustrated subgraphs detected (closed loops with odd number of antagonistic edges).

locus_points.description: The actual curve/surface points to render. Each point may carry uncertainty.

basin_surface.description: Optional 3D Lyapunov surface data. Only included if request_options.include_basin_surface was true.

valid_lyapunov.description: False means the surface has topological tears (k_frust regions). Renderer MUST display tears, not smooth-extrapolate.

z_matrix.description: Lyapunov values. null cells = framework silent at this point; renderer MUST display as a hole, not interpolate.

tears.description: Explicit list of tear regions with boundaries.

equation.description: Mathematical formula behind this prediction, for the equation sidebar.

posit_grade.description: Epistemic status flags. Renderer uses these to apply dashed treatments, uncertainty bands, 'framework silent' annotations.

status.description: load_bearing_tested = solid; load_bearing_untested = framework claims this but no empirical test yet; posit_grade = depends on an unverified posit; extension_axis = uses a v9 §Extension axis; out_of_scope = framework refuses to render here.

annotations.description: Human-readable epistemic notes for the renderer to display.
